info.name: Workday Integration Workday Time Tracking API

description.content:
API for time entry, attendance, absence management, and scheduling. Supports clock events, time block management, time review events, and validation of worker time records.

Contact Support:
 Name: Workday API Support
 Email: api-support@workday.com
